# KclautX

> KclautX is a Nigerian fintech platform to buy and sell crypto, exchange gift cards for instant cash, and pay bills — all from one secure, KYC-verified app.

## Services
- [Buy and Sell Crypto](https://kclautx.com/buy-sell-crypto/): Trade Bitcoin, USDT, Ethereum and more at competitive rates with instant Naira settlement.
- [Gift Card Exchange](https://kclautx.com/gift-card-exchange/): Sell Amazon, Steam, iTunes, Google Play and 100+ gift cards for instant cash.
- [Bill Payment](https://kclautx.com/bill-payment/): Buy airtime and data, pay electricity, TV subscriptions and more instantly.
- [All Services](https://kclautx.com/services/): Overview of everything KclautX offers.

## Company
- [About Us](https://kclautx.com/about): Who KclautX is and what we do.
- [Help Center](https://kclautx.com/help): Guides and answers to common questions.
- [Support](https://kclautx.com/support): Contact channels and assistance.

## Legal
- [Terms of Service](https://kclautx.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://kclautx.com/privacy)
- [Cookie Policy](https://kclautx.com/cookie)
- [AML/KYC Policy](https://kclautx.com/aml-kyc)
